name: 6pc Plastic Drawer Organizer Clear - Brightroom™: Desk & Office Organization Set, Clear Desk Drawer Organizers
description:
Decluttering your drawers is fast and easy with this 6-Piece Plastic Drawer Organizer from Brightroom™. This set includes six bins in different sizes for storing different types of items, from staplers to post-its to paper clips. The bins fit easily into any drawer, and the translucent clear hue matches any color scheme while also letting you see what you've stored inside of each. Whether you work at home or in an office, this set of six drawer organizers is a smart and practical pick-up.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
